title: Saturn's Backpacks
description: This mod adds two backpacks to the game in a vanilla friendly way and also keeping in mind that players tend to use shulker boxes for storage in the end-game!
body: # Saturn's Backpacks Saturn's Backpacks has one primary objective: to introduce a vanilla-friendly portable storage solution to the game. This mod includes two types of backpacks, each serving a specific purpose. The first one is craftable in the early game, designed to assist with traveling and exploration. The second backpack becomes available in the mid-game. I took into consideration that players prefer to favor Shulker Boxes in the endgame. Therefore, I've ensured that these backpacks do not replace them. My goal is to enhance the gameplay without disrupting established vanilla mechanics or the use of items players have grown accustomed to, such as Shulker Boxes. # Details - Backpack - The main backpack has 18 Slots, and is craftable using 8 leather and a chest. - Ender Bag - The ender bag has 27 slots uses an eye of ender surrounded by 8 leather to craft. # The future of this mod In the future i'm going to port this mod over to fabric, and add more portable storage options! # Can i use it in my modpack? Of course you can!
